core_principles: Warm & Organic: Use the seedling/growth metaphor to create a welcoming, professional therapy environment. Avoid clinical or sterile pure whites and stark greys.
Bilingual Elegance: Seamlessly blend RTL Arabic with LTR English. Use Tajawal for rounded, friendly, and highly legible Arabic/English body text, and Playfair Display for premium English headlines.

Density with Breathing Room: As a workspace tool (schedule, attendance, forms), the UI must be dense enough for productivity but use soft radii, generous padding inside cards, and pastel status colors to prevent cognitive overload.
design_philosophy.surface_strategy: Tactile & Soft. Use flat or very slightly tinted backgrounds (off-white/cream) for main areas, with cards having a 1px warm border (#E8E4DE) and very soft, ambient green-tinted shadows. Avoid pure black shadows or harsh high-contrast borders.

hierarchy.overline: font-sans text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#8B9E7A]

typography.rtl_guidelines: Ensure the application supports 'dir="rtl"'. Use Tailwind's logical properties (e.g., 'ms-4' instead of 'ml-4', 'pe-2' instead of 'pr-2', 'text-start' instead of 'text-left') to ensure layouts flip correctly for Arabic text.

layout.spacing_scale: Use Tailwind default scale. Over-index on p-6 and p-8 for cards to provide breathing room.

grid_system.schedule_table: Dense CSS Grid or HTML Table. Min-width for cells to prevent squishing. Sticky first column (time/therapist) and sticky header (days).

buttons.primary: bg-[#7A8A6A] hover:bg-[#606E52] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-all active:scale-[0.98] shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F0E9D8] hover:bg-[#E8E4DE] text-[#48543E] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.outline: bg-white border border-[#E8E4DE] hover:border-[#7A8A6A] text-[#5C6853] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-bold transition-all hover:shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-[#E5EBE1] text-[#5C6853] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E8E4DE] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(61,79,53,0.04)] transition-all hover:shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(61,79,53,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
cards.stat_card: flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E8E4DE] relative overflow-hidden. Use a subtle gradient or large faint icon in the background.

inputs.text: w-full bg-white border border-[#E8E4DE] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#2C3625] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7A8A6A]/20 focus:border-[#7A8A6A] transition-all placeholder:text-[#A8B5A0]
inputs.select: appearance-none w-full bg-white border border-[#E8E4DE] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#2C3625] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7A8A6A]/20 focus:border-[#7A8A6A] bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;charset=US-ASCII,%3Csvg%20width%3D%2220%22%20height%3D%2220%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2020%2020%22%20fill%3D%22none%22%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M5%207.5L10%2012.5L15%207.5%22%20stroke%3D%22%236B7B65%22%20stroke-width%3D%221.5%22%20stroke-linecap%3D%22round%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E')] bg-no-repeat bg-[position:calc(100%-1rem)_center] rtl:bg-[position:1rem_center]

status_pills.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
status_pills.variants: Use semantic colors defined in the colors.semantic object. E.g., bg-[#FAF0D1] text-[#6B5218] for 'Pending'.

schedule_grid.header_cell: bg-[#F6F4F0] p-3 text-sm font-bold text-[#5C6853] border-b border-[#E8E4DE] text-center
schedule_grid.time_cell: bg-[#F6F4F0] p-3 text-xs font-bold text-[#8B9E7A] border-r border-[#E8E4DE] rtl:border-r-0 rtl:border-l text-center w-20 shrink-0
schedule_grid.data_cell: border-b border-r border-[#E8E4DE] rtl:border-r-0 rtl:border-l p-1 min-w-[120px] transition-colors cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#E5EBE1]/30
schedule_grid.event_block: w-full h-full rounded-lg p-2 text-xs flex flex-col gap-1 border shadow-sm transition-transform active:scale-95

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Use 20px for inline text icons, 24px for standard UI controls, 32px+ for empty states or dashboard widgets.
icons.logo_instructions: Use Phosphor 'Plant' icon (Duotone) combined with text 'BOOST GROWTH' as the main logo. Color: #7A8A6A.

images.description: Abstract, warm, organic fluid texture with sage green and cream tones for the login page background.
Calming natural botanical or therapy room texture for the left panel of the auth screen.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must change state on hover. Buttons should dim/darken, cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) with increased shadow.
motion_and_interactions.active: Buttons and clickable schedule cells should have an active:scale-[0.98] to feel responsive.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use Tailwind's standard 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for smooth color and shadow changes.
motion_and_interactions.modals: Modals (like cell edit or attendance form) should enter with a subtle fade and scale up (opacity-0 scale-95 to opacity-100 scale-100).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over the primary sage green (#7A8A6A) is pure white. Muted text (#8B9E7A) should only be used on very light backgrounds (#F6F4F0 or #FFFFFF).
accessibility_and_testing.rtl: Use logical properties everywhere (e.g. padding-inline-start, margin-inline-end). Avoid fixed left/right positioning.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, links, tabs, and interactive grid cells MUST have 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case representing their role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='schedule-cell-tuesday-9am').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react for the icon set. Use 'Plant' icon as the brand logo.
Configure Tailwind to support RTL using logical properties and ensure the HTML tag receives dir='rtl' dynamically based on user language (default to Arabic).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the marketing/login layouts, and customized Shadcn components for dashboard forms, selects, and dialogs.
Customize Shadcn components heavily: increase border-radius to 12px or 16px (rounded-xl/2xl), change default borders to #E8E4DE, and remove pure black shadows.
The weekly schedule is a complex component: implement it using CSS Grid with a sticky column for therapists/time, and allow click-to-open 'cell edit modal' functionality.
Attendance sheets require an invoice-style layout. Build a dense table view with pagination or tabbed navigation for different Gregorian months.
For the typography, import 'Tajawal' and 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts and set Tajawal as the default sans font in tailwind.config.js.
